# CAOS - CA Practice Management Research
> Complete market research, competitive analysis, and product strategy for CA (Chartered Accountant) practice management, CRM, and document intelligence SaaS in India.

## About
This documentation contains comprehensive research on building a SaaS platform for Indian Chartered Accountant firms. It covers market analysis (407,629 ICAI members, 100,138 registered firms), competitive landscape (26 competitors analyzed), product strategy, business model, and go-to-market approach.

## Key Topics
- Indian CA profession landscape (407,629 ICAI members, 159,557 practicing, 100,138 firms)
- Practice management software market (INR 141-364 Cr TAM, less than 2% penetration)
- CRM and client management for CA firms
- Document intelligence and automation for tax documents
- Compliance workflow management (GST, ITR, TDS, ROC)
- Competitive analysis of 26 products
- Pricing and business model strategy
- Go-to-market strategy for Indian CA market
- Regulatory opportunity (ICAI advertising reform, DPDP Act, Digital Public Infrastructure)

## Author
Rakesh Waghela - Technology & Product Consultant
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rakeshwaghela
- X: https://x.com/webiyo
- Consultation: https://topmate.io/rakeshwaghela
